1805400.name: WorldsKeeper
1805400.description:
Worlds Keeper is a virtual reality tower defense.
You play as a hero alone in his spaceship. Thanks to an advanced device, you have the possibility to interact with different worlds in different universes and times. Your mission is to help them get rid of a whole bunch of enemies that are stronger than the others and thus let these worlds endure without threats.

Can you save them all and earn the title of "Worlds Keeper"?



▪️ Explore diverse, handcrafted worlds, fill in little secrets to find.

▪️ Define your defense strategy to overcome enemy waves.

▪️ Adapt to each situation, each universe, each enemy to go as far as possible.

▪️ Place turrets and find the best combination to stop enemies.

▪️ Play and have fun!
1805400.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
